spec_match.rationale: The playlist still demonstrates audio:playing + .track-row sibling selectors and :muted-driven row decoration.

interactive.rationale: The generated track audio elements now use the shared local CC0 MP3 fixture instead of a silent data URI, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for playback verification.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still shows class-free visual state for active playlist rows.

edge_cases.rationale: The JS fallback remains for unsupported selectors, but local media decode and mute behavior still need browser confirmation.

references.rationale: The page includes the required ChromeStatus entry and MDN reference.

design_system.rationale: The asset change does not alter the page's design-system layout or color usage.

openQuestions.title: Verify playlist audio fixture playback
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to select tracks, play, pause, move next/previous, mute, and verify the CSS sibling selector state remains correct.

summary: Static repair moved playlist tracks from a silent inline MP3 to the shared local CC0 audio fixture while preserving the sibling-selector structure.
